title: Planchonella chartacea
taxonomy: Planchonella chartacea is classified as a species within the family Sapotaceae. This family comprises over 100 genera and more than 1,000 species of trees and shrubs. The genus Planchonella, to which P. chartacea belongs, is native to the Pacific Islands and Australia. Within the Sapotaceae family, Planchonella chartacea is further classified as a member of the order Ericales, which consists of flowering plants. The classification of P. chartacea reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
